rfps.title: Nationwide Advertising & Multimedia Services for Public Health Outreach
rfps.issuer: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services
rfps.description: Full-service advertising, media buying, and multimedia production to support a national public health awareness campaign, including creative development, media planning, and paid placement across broadcast, digital, and social channels.

rfps.title: Recruitment Marketing & Digital Advertising Agency Support
rfps.description: Advertising agency to deliver recruitment marketing, employer branding, and performance-based digital advertising to support hiring goals across clinical and administrative roles.

rfps.title: Public Relations & Strategic Communications Support Services
rfps.description: PR agency to provide strategic communications, media relations, and content creation supporting conservation messaging and visitor engagement programs.

rfps.title: Statewide Tourism Marketing & Media Buying Services
rfps.description: Integrated marketing agency to lead brand strategy, creative, and media buying for the statewide destination marketing program, targeting domestic leisure travel.

rfps.title: Lottery Advertising & Creative Agency of Record
rfps.description: Agency of record for advertising, creative, promotions, and media across the state lottery portfolio, including responsible-play messaging and retailer support.

rfps.title: Transit Authority Public Awareness & Advertising Campaign
rfps.description: Creative and media services for a public awareness campaign promoting transit ridership, safety, and new service launches across the metro region.

rfps.title: University Brand & Enrollment Marketing Services
rfps.description: Marketing agency to support brand strategy and enrollment/recruitment marketing, including digital advertising, content, and prospective-student engagement.

rfps.title: Global Creative Agency Review — Consumer Beverages
rfps.description: Major beverage brand launching a global creative agency review covering brand campaigns, digital, and social. Incumbent relationship under evaluation; new roster expected by Q4.

rfps.title: Media Agency Pitch — Retail & E-commerce
rfps.description: National retailer reviewing its media planning and buying account, with an emphasis on retail media networks, connected TV, and performance marketing.

rfps.title: Casino & Gaming Brand Seeking Integrated Agency Partner
rfps.description: Regional casino and resort operator seeking an integrated agency for brand, loyalty marketing, and destination advertising ahead of a property expansion.

rfps.title: Economic Development Marketing & Advertising Services
rfps.description: Agency to deliver marketing, advertising, and lead-generation services promoting regional business attraction and talent recruitment.

rfps.title: Convention & Visitors Bureau Advertising Agency of Record
rfps.description: Destination marketing organization seeking an advertising agency of record for creative, media, and campaign management targeting leisure and group travel.

rfps.title: Sports Commission Sponsorship & Promotional Marketing RFP
rfps.description: Marketing and promotional services to support event sponsorship activation, fan engagement, and destination promotion for major sporting events.

rfps.title: Market Research & Audience Insights Services
rfps.description: Market research and audience insights to inform outreach and communications strategy, including survey design, segmentation, and message testing.

rfps.title: City Communications & Social Media Management Services
rfps.description: Communications agency to manage social media, content creation, and paid promotion for citywide public information and engagement initiatives.
